nasb.text: He caused the east wind to blow in the heavens And by His power He directed the south wind.

esv.text: He caused the east wind to blow in the heavens, and by his power he led out the south wind;

cnv.text: 他從天空颳起東風， 施能力領出南風。

ccb.text: 祂使空中刮起东风， 用大能引来南风，

csbs.text: 他使东风从天上刮起， 以他的力量引领南风；
